name: sporting-finances
description: An interactive, high-fidelity single-page application dashboard tracing the financial evolution of **Sporting Clube de Portugal - Futebol, SAD** over the last 13 fiscal years.

scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf coverage

author: Guilherme Lima
_pinnedDependencyNotes: vite/vitest/@vitest-coverage-v8/jsdom in devDependencies are pinned to exact versions (no ^) rather than left as caret ranges. They were all on very recent major releases (vite 8, vitest/coverage-v8 4, jsdom 27) as of this review, with less real-world mileage than the rest of the toolchain. A caret range wouldn't auto-bump the major anyway, but it would auto-bump minor/patch releases of a young major unattended; pinning exactly freezes the versions this app has actually been tested against until someone deliberately reviews and bumps them.
